name: Cloudvirga (ICE) Digital Mortgage API
what_it_does: Cloudvirga (ICE Mortgage Technology) Digital Mortgage Platform REST API for enterprise digital mortgage origination. Enables AI agents to manage digital borrower application and POS workflow for enterprise lender mortgage automation, handle loan officer tools and collaborative origination for LO productivity, access automated income and asset verification for underwriting acceleration, retrieve compliance and disclosure management for TRID automation, manage intelligent pipeline and task management for loan processor workflow, handle real-time pricing and product eligibility for borrower experience, access data analytics and origination performance for lender business intelligence, retrieve document collection and verification for underwriting automation, manage multi-channel origination (retail, wholesale, consumer direct) for enterprise lending operations, and integrate Cloudvirga with Encompass LOS and ICE mortgage ecosystem.
use_cases: Digitizing enterprise mortgage origination from LOS agents
Verifying income and assets from underwriting agents
Managing compliance disclosures from TRID agents
Optimizing loan pipeline from processor workflow agents
not_for: Community lenders seeking simpler mortgage POS solutions
Lenders not using Encompass or ICE mortgage ecosystem
best_when: An enterprise mortgage lender using Cloudvirga with Encompass wants AI agents to automate digital borrower origination, income/asset verification, compliance disclosures, and loan pipeline management.
avoid_when: ICE ECOSYSTEM DEPENDENCY: Cloudvirga is tightly integrated with ICE Encompass and the ICE mortgage technology stack; automated workflows are optimized for Encompass LOS; lenders on non-ICE LOS platforms may face significant integration friction. TRID tolerance compliance — automated disclosure generation must comply with TRID fee tolerance thresholds (0% tolerance for origination charges, 10% tolerance for third-party services); automated pricing errors create tolerance cure obligations. ICE/Black Knight merger integration risk — ICE acquired Encompass and Black Knight products; post-merger product rationalization may affect Cloudvirga roadmap and API stability; evaluate ICE technology roadmap commitment to Cloudvirga before large-scale integration investment.

auth.notes: Cloudvirga uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Irvine, California HQ. Founded 2015. Acquired by ICE Mortgage Technology (2018). ICE is Intercontinental Exchange (ICE NYSE). Enterprise mortgage POS platform. Deep Encompass integration. Competes with Blend and SimpleNexus for enterprise digital mortgage origination.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; per-loan or per-user pricing
pricing.notes: Irvine, California. ICE Mortgage Technology subsidiary (ICE NYSE). Founded 2015. Acquired 2018. Enterprise mortgage POS. Deep Encompass integration. Competes with Blend for enterprise.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: ICE ENCOMPASS LOS DEPENDENCY: Cloudvirga is architected for Encompass LOS integration; automated workflows outside the Encompass ecosystem create significant integration complexity; validate LOS compatibility before deployment

TRID tolerance zero-tolerance fees — automated origination fee pricing must maintain strict TRID zero-tolerance compliance for lender origination charges; automated pricing changes to zero-tolerance fees after disclosure create mandatory cure obligations

ICE product rationalization risk — ICE acquired both Encompass and Black Knight's Empower LOS; ongoing ICE mortgage technology rationalization may affect Cloudvirga product investment and API roadmap; verify ICE's commitment to Cloudvirga platform

Income and asset verification automation — automated income and asset verification integration with third-party verification services (The Work Number, Finicity) must handle API failures gracefully; verification service downtime creates underwriting bottleneck

HMDA data collection in digital application — automated digital application must correctly capture Government Monitoring Information per Reg C; HMDA collection errors in digital POS create regulatory risk

Multi-channel compliance variation — Cloudvirga supports retail and wholesale channels with different licensing and disclosure requirements; automated workflows must apply channel-specific compliance rules
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise mortgage POS. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Mortgage application and borrower data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mortgage POS. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Mortgage and borrower data.
